title: A Dead End
description:
I... I don't get it. One day they were trying to stave off the Collapse, and then, suddenly... Nothing.  

That earthquake-resistant housing project was shut down by a group named MANTIKOR. Think you could find out more?

objectives.text: Find MANTIKOR's underground facilities
Find a way into the locked room in the Security Wing
Search the locked room for any records on Project Heartwood
Find the Dusty Film Reel
Deliver the Dusty Film Reel to Shani

title: A First Foothold
description:
We've only just finished expanding the Tube network towards the Blue Gate, and we're still laboring away at the rest. 

My crew's been building new infrastructure around the valley to safeguard our Raiders, but the constant ARC threat has made it difficult to get anything done.

objectives.text: Stabilize the observation deck near the Ridgeline
Enable the comms terminal near the Olive Grove
Rotate the satellite dishes on the church roof, north of the Data Vault.
Nail down the roof plates on the Raider structure near Trapper's Glade

title: A Primse Specimen
description: That Deforester by the Blue Gate may have caused some real devastation, but a pristine husk like that is also an invaluable sample for our research.

objectives.text: Obtain 2 ARC Powercells
Interact with any ARC Deforester

title: Armored Transports
description:
Ever since we expanded the tunnels to the Blue Gate, some rare pieces have started appearing on the black market. 

Meanwhile, I'm stuck here peddling battered old Rattlers. If I don't find new supply lines, I'll be left in the dust.

objectives.text: Reach the Checkpoint
Search the Guard huts for a Armored Patrol Key Card

title: Bees!
description: Bees! There are still bees around! While I'm no expert, our greenhouse crew desperately wants some.

objectives.text: Reach the Olive Grove in Blue Gate
Search for bee hives around the Olive Grove

title: Clamoring For Attention
description: I think I've found something we might exploit. When bigger ARC machines are just far enough from each other, a well-timed distraction could pull one out of position. You want to test that idea?

objectives.text: Use 3 Wires to repair and sound the emergency siren by the Warehouse Complex
Sound any bus horn by the Checkpoint
Use a Battery to start the boom box in the Village

title: Groundbreaking
description: Data or no data: we'll learn how to make this place earthquake-proof. With a research this in-depth, there's bound to be a paper trail somewhere.

objectives.text: Enter the locked room at Pilgrim's Peak
Search the room for any construction research
Find the building pictured on the whiteboard
Photograph the abandoned housing project

title: Keeping An Eye Out
description: I'm looking for someone. Bilguun. You might've seen him around, but chances are you haven't. He's... not the most sociable person around, you see. He spends a lot of time Topside, but usually returns to Speranza regularly to check in.

objectives.text: Locate the collapsed highway by the southern edge of the Barren Clearing
Find Bilguun's shelter, and search for any clues of his presence

title: Outstanding Balance
description:
I had a deal for a Bastion Cell lined up with a Raider called Doddger, but he's gone quiet. 

I need someone to track down his stash before some scavenger stumbles into it. Interested?

objectives.text: Search for Dodger's stash inside the Traffic Tunnel
Search Dodger's deal spot by the Pilgrim's Peak antenna
Deliver Dodger's Note to Tian Wen

title: Reduced To Rubble
description: That collapsed highway worries me; it looks to be recent. Much of Topside may be in ruins, but most of it is from ages ago.

objectives.text: Take a photo of the Collapsed Highway
Go to the Broken Earth
Follow the trail of destruction through the Broken Earth
Investigate the unknown ARC machines

title: With A Trace
description: That downed machine... We weren't the ones who did that. We know that there are stray survivors out there, but this? This goes far beyond a single person.

objectives.text: Reach the Barren Clearing
Find signs of who brought down the ARC machines
Inspect the Adorned Wreckage
Inspect the communications device

title: Back On Top
area: Blue Gate, Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description: Guess what? Shani asked me to help out with something, and for once, I'm actually glad she did. We're setting up new outposts topside! Or, planning to, at least. Can you believe it?

objectives.text: On Dam Battlegrounds, mark the Pattern House
On The Blue Gate, mark the white lookout tower south of the Warehouse Complex
On Spaceport, mark the South Trench Tower
On Buried City, mark the building with the mural in the Buried Properties

title: Hatch Repairs
area: Blue Gate, Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description: Our scours have reported several Raider Hatches with leaking hydraulic pipes. They still work, but not for long. Mind patching one up, next time you're out there?

objectives.text: Repair the leaking hydraulic pipes near a Raider Hatch

title: Into The Fray
area: Blue Gate, Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description:
It used to be their world, up there. Nobody to challenge their claim. 

Yet here we are. More outposts. More intel. More firepower. If I didn't know better, I'd say we've got quite a bit of fight left in us.

objectives.text: Destroy a Leaper
Obtain a Leaper Pulse Unit

title: Mixed Signals
area: Blue Gate, Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description:
Have you spotted any Surveyors; the big round ones? 

They seem to be transmitting data back into orbit, and I can't help but think it's tied to that signal we picked up. Will you break one open, so we can try to decipher the data?

objectives.text: Destroy an ARC Surveyor
Obtain 1 Surveyor Vault

title: Out Of The Shadows
area: Blue Gate, Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description: Did you see the flags? The time for cowering is over. You've been more than battle-tested, from what I hear; think you can take on a Rocketeer?

objectives.text: Destroy a Rocketeer
Obtain a Rocketeer Driver

title: Sparks Fly
area: Blue Gate, Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description:
Those Hornet stings can really mess you up, if you're unlucky. And even if you destroy one, you're still wasting a ton of ammo. 

 I've been working on a more elegant way to bring them down. Care to make some sparks fly?

objectives.text: Destroy a Hornet with a Trigger 'Nade or Snap Blast

title: A Reveal In Ruins
description: I got my hands on a fancy new ESR analyzer; had a whole big reveal planned. One minute it's here, next minute—poof. Please help?

objectives.text: Search for an ESR Analyzer inside any pharmacy in Buried City
Deliver the ESR Analyzer to Lance

title: A Warm Place To Rest
description: A customer of mine saw a family taking cover in an old encampment in Buried City. I'll pay anyone who manages to find them and escort them back to safety.

objectives.text: Locate the Abandoned Highway Camp
Search for any signs of survivors
Follow the red markers
Inspect the grave

title: After Rain Comes
description:
I know, I know! The power's down in sector—Oh, hey. A flash flood took out some of our solar panels in Buried City, and the generators only hold on for so long. 

Do us all a solid when you're up there, OK?

objectives.text: Find the flooded solar panels nearby the Grandioso Apartments
Repair the solar panels using 5 Wires and 2 Batteries

title: Building A Library
description: Our library selection has grown pretty stale. Could you head out to Buried City, and find something more for us to read? Make sure you bring a wide variety of genres.

objectives.text: Locate the library in the City Center
Find 1 Romance book
Find 1 detective book
Find 1 adventure book

title: Combat Recon
description:
With those Bombardiers roaming around, ARC has found an entirely new way to flush Raiders out of cover. 

If you're hoping to take one down, you'll need to sharpen your skills and your strategy.

objectives.text: Scope out a cover spot in the Parking Garage staircases
Scope out a cover spot in the buses near Marano Park
Scope out a cover spot in the attics around Main Street
Destroy 2 Spotters
Deliver a spotter relay to Shani

title: Communication Hideout
description: We've been losing signals in some areas of Buried City—my guess is that our equipment is acting up. You're quite skilled with repairs, aren't you? Could you check it out?

objectives.text: Reach the Red Tower in Old Town
Find missing battery cell
Install the battery cell in the Generator
Enable the power on the Generator
Boot the antenna terminal near the Red Tower

title: Digging Up Dirt
description: We caught a break. One of our scouts saw a member of the Official Toledo Tubes Management make a dead drop inside of the Santa Maria Houses in Old Town, in the Buried City. This might be our chance to dig up some dirt on them for a change. You in?

objectives.text: Locate the Santa Maria Houses in Old Town
Locate the Dead Drop inside the Santa Maria Houses in Old Town

title: Espresso
description:
A Raider came into my shop earlier, to trade some grenades for a machine she found in Buried City. 

She said it makes coffee, but it seems to be missing a few parts. Up for a job?

objectives.text: Find an espresso machine to salvage for spare parts
Get the Espresso Machine Parts for Apollo

title: Eyes On The Prize
description: Everything's been calm around my drop-offs since you helped out. But that doesn't mean it'll stay that way for long. I've set up surveillance at one of my most used spots in Buried City, to prevent future tampering. Only problem is, it needs power to go live.

objectives.text: Find the secluded roof terrace south-west of the Southern Station, look for blue tarps.
Rewire the solar panel using 3 Wires

title: Industrial Espionage
description: With my own stashes secured, I think it might be time to keep a closer eye on the competition so this doesn't happen again.

objectives.text: Find Tian Wen's weapon cache near the Gas Station in the Outskirts
Deliver the Burletta to the rival weapon cache
Plant a bug on the weapon cache

title: Life of a Pharmacist
description: This place could use a makeover, but I don't want it looking like your raggedy Raider Dens. See if you can find out how my fellow medical greats used to live.

objectives.text: Find the Arbusto Farmacia then search the apartment above
Document the pharmacist's hobbies
Document the pharmacist's family
Document the pharmacist's taste
Document the pharmacist's skills

title: Line In The Sand
description: That Stella Montis hard drive contained more than just the shutdown documentation - it also had the transport schedules of some pretty critical Exodus components.

objectives.text: Find out why the train never reached Marano Station
Find out who orchestrated the robbery
Find out where the thruster valves were stashed
Search the basement of the merchant's nearby apartment

title: Marked For Death
description: Someone has been lifting supplies from my drop-off point in Buried City. I've set up a trap, but I need someone to check it for me.

objectives.text: Reach the Su Durante Warehouse in the Outskirts in Buried City
Search for Tian Wen's cache near the Warehouses
Follow the clues

title: Market Correction
description: That theft before? Doesn't look like a coincidence anymore. Some of the competition from Toledo is setting up shop where they don't belong. I want their cache sabotaged, preferably before they get too comfortable.

objectives.text: Locate the cache near Marano Station

title: Settled In Full
description: Lucky for you, Dodger's debt can still be settled. Bring me a Bastion Cell. A real one, pulled from a real Bastion. Consider what Dodger owed me transferred credit for you. Okay?

objectives.text: Destroy a Bastion
Deliver a Bastion Cell to Tian Wen

title: The Root of the Matter
description: We're in luck. The notes you found last time were written by the lead researcher. When the project went under, it seems she took some of the seed samples and sealed them away in a secure location.

objectives.text: Go to the Research Building
Search for the seed vault in the "room with a great view"

title: Unexpected Initiative
description: I'm setting up a greenhouse, to help boost our food production. I'm doing Celeste a solid, alright? That's all. But enough about that. I've got all the details worked out, but I'll need supplies, and I'm not hauling them alone.

objectives.text: Reach the Grandioso Apartments in Buried City
Search for Fertilizer on the rooftop of the Grandioso Apartments
Reach Piazza Roma in Buried City
Search for a Water Pump in the broken rooftop gardens at Piazza Roma
Deliver a Water Pump to Tian Wen
Deliver Fertilizer to Tian Wen

title: A Rising Tide
description: Says here there was a foreman at The Dam, who got recruited right after they canceled Project Heartwood. Got put in charge of some big reconstruction project.

objectives.text: On Buried City, find the foreman's barricaded apartment south of Piazza Roma
Access the foreman's digital logbook
On Dam Battlegrounds, reach the Power Generation Complex
Find a way into the Controlled Access Zone
Search the Controlled Access Zone for any clues about the foreman's reconstruction project

title: Down To Earth
area: Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description:
Raiders have long reported peculiar-looking crates dropping down from malfunctioning ARC Probes. 

If we can figure out a way to crack them open, we might get a better understanding of what it is they're after.

objectives.text: Visit a Field Depot
Deliver a Field Crate to a Supply Station
Collect the reward

title: Eyes In The Sky
area: Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description: Those LiDAR scanners you found work best when put in high locations. I've identified a few good spots around the Rust Belt; hope you're surefooted.

objectives.text: On Dam Battlegrounds, install a LiDAR Scanner at the top of the Control Tower
On Spaceport, install a LiDAR Scanner at the Communications Tower
On Buried City, install a LiDAR Scanner on top of the Galleria sign

title: Greasing Her Palms
area: Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description: Recently, I've been trying and failing to get Tian Wen to join our community projects. I may have to sweeten the deal. She's been complaining about quality of salvage found on the market; think we could do her a solid?

objectives.text: On Dam Battlegrounds, visit the Locked Room in the Water Treatment Control building
On Spaceport, scope out the rocket thrusters outside the Rocket Assembly
On Buried City, visit the barricaded area on floor 6 of the Space Travel Building

title: Medical Merchandise
area: Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description: I've become quite crafty at weaving bandages from Fabric, but to my shame, I haven't quite mastered weaving an x-ray machine or pulse oximiter.

objectives.text: On Spaceport, search 2 containers in the Departure Building's exam rooms
Search 3 containers in the Hospital in Buried City
On Dam Battlegrounds, search 2 containers in the Research & Administration building's medical room

title: What We Left Behind
area: Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport
description: Celeste told me you're the one who helped her hound me about pitching in more. I'll say this once: I don't appreciate the meddling, and I have my own reasons for refusing. I do, however, appreciate the scrap. Since you're apparently good at tracking it down, I may have a task for you.

objectives.text: On Buried City, search 2 containers in the Raider Camp beneath the Parking Garage
On Dam Battlegrounds, search for anything significant in the South Swamp Outpost
On Spaceport, search for anything significant in Bilguun's Hideout, next to the Container Storage

title: A Bad Feeling
area: Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Blue Gate
description:
Even the slightest change in ARC's behavior could spell disaster. 

And that signal you heard? It's like nothing we've ever picked up. If they're up to something, we need to find out whatever we can.

objectives.text: Find and search any ARC Probe or ARC Courier

title: A Better Use
area: Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Blue Gate
description: We're short on everything but mouths to feed, yet Celeste's launching precious supplies into the air for Raiders to claw over. I'm done letting the good stuff go to waste.

objectives.text: Request a Supply Drop from a Call Station
Loot a Supply Drop

title: The Trifecta
area: Buried City, Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Blue Gate
description: Intel's all well and good, but it only gets us so far. If ARC's truly closing in, I need every Raider to prove they can handle their drones in a fight.

objectives.text: Destroy a Wasp
Destroy a Hornet
Get a Hornet Driver for Shani
Destroy a Snitch
Get a Snitch Scanner for Shani
Get a Wasp Driver for Shani

title: Off The Radar
area: Buried City, The Spaceport, Dam Battlegrounds
description: The damage down here was pretty bad, but our Topside infrastructure was hit even harder. I still have several antennas that stopped working after the storm.

objectives.text: Visit a Field Depot
Repair the antenna on the roof of the Field Depot

title: A Balanced Harvest
description: Our food production is finally enough to meet our basic needs, but what we really need now is variety. I have a lead on some agricultural research from before the First Wave. Are you in?

objectives.text: Go to the Research & Administration building
Locate Lab 1 on the upper floor above the reception
Search for any traces of the agricultural research project

title: A New Type Of Plant
description: Some scouts have been bringing back reports of these weird plants spreading into the area. Now, this makes your old pal Lance think it may have some interesting uses.

objectives.text: Search for the new plant near the Baron Husk in the Old Battleground
Deliver the Possibly Toxic Plant to Lance

title: A Symbol Of Unification
description: Y'know, back in the day we actually used to have a flag — well, a scrap of cloth more than anything. Still, seeing it meant you knew you had allies nearby, that you were on your home turf. So I was thinking...

objectives.text: Reach the Formicai Outpost in Dam Battlegrounds
Locate the flag at the Formicai Outpost
Hoist the flag on the small platform overlooking the Red Lake

title: A Toxic Trail
description: We've got clean water again, but we can't risk people falling ill if the saboteurs return. We need to root them out once and for all.

objectives.text: Return to the water intake below the Water Treatment Control building
Search the swamp for traces of the barrel's origins
Take a pgoto of the barrel truck
Search the truck for clues about the saboteur's identity

title: Broken Monument
description: I have another special site I need you to search for me. An old battlegrounds, from the First Wave. Raiders nowadays usually pick places like that clean, despite the significance they once held. People forget quickly. Quicker than they should.

objectives.text: Reach the hallowed grounds by the Scrap Yard
Search for a compass near the broken-down vehicles
Search for the video tape near the cylindrical containers
Search for the old field rations in the Raider camp
Deliver the First Wave Tape to Tian Wen
Deliver the First Wave Compass to Tian Wen
Deliver First Wave Rations to Tian Wen

title: Celeste's Journals
description: Okay, so this is awkward... I lost two of my journals during some outpost inspections last time I went topside. Could you head out there and try to find them back before someone else stumbles on them?

objectives.text: Retreive Celeste's Journals from the South Swamp Outpost
Retrieve Celeste's Journals from the northern outpost overlooking the Red Lakes
Deliver 2 Journals to Celeste

title: Echoes Of Victory Ridge
description: Did you feel any tremors last night? Me neither. But apparently the ground shifted at some point, and in the process it unearthed an old First Wave outpost that'd been blocked by debris. I'd like you to get in there quick, before anyone else does.

objectives.text: Reach Victory Ridge
Retrieve the battle plans from the hideout under the broken highway

title: Flickering Threat
description: My usual engineer is still healing from his wounds, and has been loopy for days. We can't afford to be at half-grid until he heals: I need someone to pick up his wrench in the mean time.

objectives.text: Find the Generator Room
Repair the Generator
Find the Ventilation Shaft
Enable the power via the power switch underneath the stairs.

title: Keeping The Memory
description: I lost my cool a bit when I sent you after that trap. I don't usually lose my temper, but the First Wave... We went through a lot, back then. Lost a lot of people. It's still a bit of a raw wound for me, but I want you to understand.

objectives.text: Reach the wreckage in the Formicai Hills
Search for the missing helmet
Return the helmet to the memorial

title: Our Presence Up there
description: ARC may be changing, but we're finally changing with it. Let's finish up those outposts and revolutionize the way we track them, flank them, and smash them to bits.

objectives.text: Visit the Pattern House in The Dam
Find and flip the Power Switch
Complete the antenna installation on the roof

title: Source of Contamination
description: I'm not saying our water's been tampered with, but based on your samples, I can't rule out the possibility either. Would you return to the Dam and see what's wrong?

objectives.text: Reach the Water Treatment Building in The Dam
Search for the Flood Spill Intake near the Swamp
Investigate any suspicious objects

title: Straight Record
description: Back during the First Wave, my squad and I built a trap out by the Dam. Overloaded a generator, turned it into a makeshift ARC trap. Now I hear Raiders are using it to cut comms and spring ambushes on each other. I need you to end it.

objectives.text: Reach Victory Ridge
Find the old EMP trap
Disable the first power switch
Disable the second power switch
Disable the third power switch
Shut down the EMP trap

title: The League
description: Kids around here have been kicking empty grenade casings around. It's only a matter of time before they're not so empty. So here's the plan. You help me with some prep work, and I'll set up an actual football team for the young ones.

objectives.text: Deliver a Deflated Football to Apollo
Deliver a Bicycle Pump to Apollo
On Dam Battlegrounds, photograph the goal by the Water Towers
On Buried City, photograph the football magazines in any kiosk

title: The Majors Footlocker
description:
I have another job. It's... about my mom. 

Those First Wave sites I sent you to before? I actually hoped you'd find something of my mother's. She fought in the Raider resistance. It was a long shot: but now I've got an actual lead.

objectives.text: Search for Major Aiva's mementos in the apartments northwest of The Dam.

title: Untended Garden
description: According to the files you found in the lab, the cultivation researchers were actually the ones who set up the hydroponic domes out in the swamp. Sounds like the most obvious place to search next, don't you think?

objectives.text: Go to the Hydroponic Dome Complex
Access the data archive in one of the domes
Upload the data to the computer terminal in any Field Depot

title: Water Troubles
description: If you're here to complain about the water, join the club. I've been fielding complaints all day. Something is definitely up with it, and I need some help to sort it out.

objectives.text: Locate the Flood Access Tunnel under the Red Lake Balcony
Find the intake to District's Water Supply
Sample the water

title: Paving The Way
area: Dam Battlegrounds, Blue Gate, Buried City
description: For an entire sector to collapse like that... No wonder people are scared. We need to reinforce beyond anything we've done before, and we can't do it alone.

objectives.text: Go to any ENELICA building
Search for a notice board with a note from the researcher
On Buried City, reach the top floor above the Convinio in Piazza Roma
Find the researcher's flat and search for any research data

title: Bombing Run
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description: Now, time to see if that recon paid off. If we can teach Raiders to effectively counter Bombardiers up there, we'd be a lot safer down here.

objectives.text: Destroy a Bombardier
Deliver a Bombardier Cell to Shani

title: Clearer Skies
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description:
A swarm of disoriented Wasps crashed near one of our skylights. 

I need you to help thin ARC's ranks before any more accidents happen, and gather some extra sturdy materials to fix the damage.

objectives.text: Destroy 3 ARC enemies
Get 3 ARC Alloy for Shani

title: Collision Course
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description: Many Raiders have learned how to dodge a Comet, but far too few know how to bring them down and get at their inner parts.

objectives.text: Destroy a Comet
Deliver a Comet Igniter to Tian Wen

title: Doctor's Orders
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description: Say, newbie: if you want me to treat you, you better prove that those precious limbs of yours are worth bandaging.

objectives.text: Obtain 1 Syringe
Obtain 2 Antiseptic
Obtain 1 Durable Cloth
Obtain 1 Great Mullein

title: Picking Up The Pieces
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description: The storm has mostly settled, but much of our infrastructure has taken a proper beating. If you're hoping to with us, I'll need you to pull your weight in the repair efforts.

objectives.text: Visit any area on your map with a loot category icon
Loot 3 containers

title: Safe Passage
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description:
I heard rumors about some signal Shani picked up. ARC is constantly adapting, and I'm sure this won't be their last warning sign. 

Well, if it's an arms race they want, they can get one.

objectives.text: Destroy 2 ARC enemies using any explosive grenade

title: Test Case
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description: Hey, question for you. What do you get if you cross a Hornet and Fireball? If your answer is 'a Firefly', then we're on the same page.

objectives.text: Deliver a Hornet Driver to Apollo
Deliver a Fireball Burner to Apollo
Destroy a Firefly
Deliver a Firefly Burner to Apollo

title: The Right Tool
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description: You're one of the new arrivals, right? I need a volunteer to test out this upgraded Ferro; should cut through ARC plating like butter. Go put holes in some machines, and report back to me.

objectives.text: Destroy a Fireball
Destroy a Hornet
Destroy a Turret

title: Trash Into Treasure
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description:
There's no such thing as junk, to a Raider; just valuable materials waiting to be recycled. 

If you're going to amount to anything around here, you can't just wait for things to be served on a silver platter.

objectives.text: Obtain 6 Wires
Obtain 1 Battery

title: Tribute to Toledo
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description: The Official Toledo Tubes Management is demanding one of our Power Rods for usage of "their" Slingshot tubes. Don't let the name fool you, they're in no way official; just thugs with lots of power. Could you help me with this?

objectives.text: Get a Power Rod for Celeste

title: What Goes Around
area: Dam Battlegrounds, The Spaceport, Buried City, Blue Gate, Stella Montis, Riven Tides
description:
We can't build ARC tech from scratch, but there's plenty I can tinker from pieces you salvage. 
I'm currently trying to repurpose different ARC parts. Would you mind running some experiments for me?

objectives.text: Destroy any ARC enemy using a Fireball Burner

title: Battening Down
description: We'd hoped the seawalls at Riven Tides might offer us some protection from the elements, but it seems the hurricanes were not kind to this place, either.

objectives.text: Photograph the cracks forming in the seawall
Sample the shoreline near the hotel beach
Fix the leaking oil pipe in the northeast

title: Battering Down
description: The seawalls at Riven Tides were supposed to protect the coast, but the place still needs work.

objectives.text: Photograph the cracks forming in the seawall
Sample the shoreline near the hotel beach
Fix the leaking oil pipe in the northeast

title: Safe Harbor
description: Seems like news of the train derailment spread fast... And drove many workers to stash some very tasty technology away from prying eyes.

objectives.text: Find the clue left by the restaurant kitchen staff
Find the area portrayed in the sketch
Dig up the buried part
Deliver the Precision Gimbal to Tian Wen

title: Shoring Up Defenses
description:
The wide-open coastline used to mean danger, but now it's the only place we can spot new threats moving into the Rust Belt.

So we'll have to make our own cover, and reinforce what few defenses we can find.

objectives.text: Destroy 5 Wasps
Destroy 3 Fireflies
Use 1 ARC Alloy to reinforce the Raider structure on top of any Stacking Yard crane
Board up shuttered windows in the hotel

title: Waking the Grid
description: There's a problem with the sensor coverage at the Spaceport. The security grid is old, but getting it running again would help.

objectives.text: Activate the security sensors in one of the Guard Towers

title: Cold Storage
description: Reports about Stella Montis keep coming in, and it's unlikely anything we've seen before. There may be records of relics from the past in there, and if so, I want them.

objectives.text: Search any J Kozma Ventures container
Deliver the Rare Books to Shani

title: Fragmented Logs
description: Now that we've found our footing on Stella Montis, several parties are interested in digging a bit deeper and seeing what we can find out about the past of this place. To do so, however, we'll need to power up some of these old machines so we can start to sift through the data.

objectives.text: In either of the Robotic Sandbox control rooms, repair the out-of-service terminal with 1 Electrical Component
Enable the power in any of the conduit backrooms near the Robotic Sandboxes
Boot the main frame data terminal in the Cultural Archives service backrooms

title: In My Image
description: I just treated one of the first Raiders who visited Stella Montis, and she said that she saw... others. Androids, very much like me.

objectives.text: Deploy into Stella Montis
Find and search 3 Androids

title: Last Entry
description: More mentions of Mantikor, and more clear signs of dissent among the researchers. I suspect tensions eventually escalated.

objectives.text: Find and access the right work station in the Seed Vault for clues
Search for the hidden key in the adjacent room
Search the Seed Vault and unblock the seed deposit box
Search the seed deposit box
Bring the Official Shutdown Document to Shani

title: On Deaf Ears
description: Seems like every other Raider here has some serious hearing damage. I heard rumors they developed some extra advanced hearing aids at Stella Montis. If you can track them down, we might all be able to use our indoor voices, for once.

objectives.text: Find the researcher's guest logs on the reception computers
Find where the researcher held their lecture, and access their notes
Find information about the prototypes on the Medical Research computers
Find the printed shipping logs in the Assembly Workshops

title: Snap And Salvage
description: All of Speranza is buzzing about Stella Montis right now, and I admit it's caught my attention. Let the others sort out the whats and hows; I'm interested in the tech inside.

objectives.text: Take a Photo of any of the Rovers in the Sandbox
Search the papers in the Security Checkpoint room by the Lobby
Deliver a Magnetron to Tian Wen
Deliver a Flow Controller to Tian Wen

title: Stable Housing
description: You like a certain amount of uncertainty, right? A client wants the contents of a locked safe in Stella Montis. It's intact, so whatever's inside has been there since before the Exodus. Interested?

objectives.text: Go to the Security Bridge
Search for the safe in the side room by the third-floor staircases
Head upstairs to the fourth-floor control room
Use the Access Card Printer to print a key to use the safe
Search for alternate ways into the safe
Retreive the contents of the safe
Deliver the Project Heartwood Blueprints to Tian Wen

title: With A View
description:
Have you ever noticed those streaks of light darting across the skies? 

I've seen too much to believe they're natural, but it'll take more than a hunch to convince Celeste.

objectives.text: Obtain a Rotary Encoder
Visit any of the Control Rooms near the Assembly Line
Use the Rotary Encoder to activate the server switch
Interact with a nearby computer to help identify the correct parts
Deliver an Ion Sputter to Shani

title: A Lay Of The Land
description:
Those distant rumbles are getting less distant with each passing day. 

I have a lead on some LiDAR scanners that may help us monitor the tremors. You do want to keep a roof over your head, don't you?

objectives.text: Reach the Jiangsu Warehouse
Find the shipping notes in the foreman's office
Locate the scanners on the upper floor of Control Tower A6

title: A Wrench In The Works
description: Looks like the resentment ended up reaching the ground staff of the Spaceport itself. A mutiny brewing, right in the heart of the Exodus.

objectives.text: Search the buses near the western gate
Locate the stash of sabotage supplies hidden at the Water Towers

title: Deciphering The Data
description:
If the data you found can keep the ceiling from collapsing, we have no time to spare. 

I know of a few magnetic decryptors around Acerra Spaceport, from back during the Exodus. They might still be working.

objectives.text: Use the Magnetic Decryptor in the Fuel Control Building
Reach the Arrival Building in Spaceport
Use the Magnetic Decryptor on the top floor of the Arrival Building

title: Dust On The Wires
description: I sent a scout team to the Spaceport a while ago. Routine work — cataloging security, see if there's anything we could re-purpose. But I've heard nothing for two days.

objectives.text: Visit any Field Depot on the eastern side of the Spaceport
Use the Field Radio to transmit the scout group's last log to Shani
Interact with the terminal in the old Raider Tower north of the Maintenance Hangar
Find traces of the scout patrol near the Maintenance Hangar
Search the remains left by the scouts
Deliver the Scout Patrol Note to Shani

title: Lost In Transmission
description: I have equipment set up at the Spaceport, to monitor ARC's movements. My connection broke down just now — I need you to head to the Control Towers and help me retrieve my logs.

objectives.text: Visit Control Tower A6
Reach the top of Control Tower A6
Establish a connection from the terminal

title: On The Map
description: We know the coordinates for those hearing aids, but I'll have to cross-reference them with a paper map of the Spaceport. Those legs of ours aren't too tired, are they?

objectives.text: Head to where the Fuel Lines snapped, and transmit your location
Head to the antenna near the Fuel Control, and transmit your location
Head to the cactus patch in the wall breach, and transmit your location
Transmit your location from the roof of the Container Storage building
Find the container covered in tarp, and mark it

title: Power Out
description: This goes beyond bad luck. Something—or someone—has knocked out some of our electrical substations. The engineer I sent out to fix it hasn't returned, so I need all available Raiders to look into it. That includes you.

objectives.text: Find the Electrical Substation south of the Spaceport
Find any sign of the missing engineer
Install the fuse
Restore the power

title: Prescriptions of the Past
description: I've been curious about the medical area in the Spaceport for a while now. Something tells me it's got just what I need to become the undeniable champion of this place.

objectives.text: Visit the Departure Building in Spaceport
Find the Medical Exam Room inside the Departure Building
Search for the records

title: Switching The Supply
description: There is a reservoir beneath the Spaceport; if we manage to rout that water here, that should buy us time to deal with the contamination.

objectives.text: Find the tunnels under the Spaceport
Find and turn the valve in the tunnels under Spaceport

title: The Stench Of Corruption
description: That key you found in the barrel truck... I won't jump to accusations just yet, but this certainly reeks of an inside job. Could you investigate a hunch I have?

objectives.text: Reach the southwest lobby of the Departure Building
Find the staff locker room
Search the room for any clues of the saboteur's identity
Reach the tunnels below the Spaceport
Use the key on any Flushing Terminal to override the bypass protocol

title: Turnabout
description: I got a plan. If we recover the evidence against the OTTM before they get to it, we might get them off our backs once and for all.

objectives.text: Go to the North Trench Tower
Locate and upload the Blackmail Files to Celeste

title: Waking The Grid
description: There's a problem with our sensor coverage at the Spaceport. The security grid is old, so maybe it's just acting up. If you could get it running again, it'd save me a lot of sleepless nights.

objectives.text: Activate the security sensors in one of the Guard Towers
Start the Security Control Center in the Departure Building
Search for any traces of a security breach in the Arrival Building Data Office

title: Worth Your Salt
description: I found notes that some electrical engineers at the Spaceport were working on advanced, salt-based batteries. If we can get our hands on one, perhaps it'll prevent full-scale power outages next time a ceiling comes crashing down.

objectives.text: Go to the Rocket Assembly
Search for the hidden Battery Prototype in a high place
Bring the Battery Prototype to the Industrial Recharger
Use the machinery to charge the battery
Deliver the Charged Battery to the drop-off point in the corner

title: The Clean Dream
description: You know what I've been dreaming of lately? A talking water distiller! Crazy, huh? But seriously, with purer compounds I could make explosives with more oumph! Would be something, right?

objectives.text: On Spaceport, search 4 containers in the underground tunnels
Find and monitor any Filtration System in the tunnels
On The Blue Gate, visit the Maintenance Bunker
Monitor the Purification System in the bunker
Find and photograph the blueprints in the bunker

title: Dormant Barons
area: The Spaceport, Dam Battlegrounds, Buried City, Blue Gate
description:
During the First Wave, the Barons did more damage than all the other machines combined. Now they're mere husks; fixed in place where they once fell... 

Still, their internals might hold the answer to keeping ARC at bay. So open one up, and bring me whatever is inside.

objectives.text: Loot a Baron Husk
